INVALID_AGENT.pattern: agent .* is invalid or expired|cannot load the agent
INVALID_AGENT.notes: INVALID_AGENT - agent number expired or invalid in system

POLICY_IN_FORCE.pattern: policyinforce|already in force.*import data has been rejected
POLICY_IN_FORCE.action: No action needed - policy already in force
example_actions_taken: You cant reimport an already active policy...NFA
No Action taken as Import was done

CONTRACT_NOT_FOUND.action: Reference mismatch due to discard. Need to send as Import
example_actions_taken: Non EDI for many years, hence needs to send as import to sunrise

INVITE_RENEWAL_NOT_CLOSED.pattern: inviterenewal.*not permitted.*contract has not been closed
INVITE_RENEWAL_NOT_CLOSED.notes: Previous renewal term has not been closed

INVITE_RENEWAL_CANCELLED.action: Check POLISY if cancelled. If cancelled, no action
example_actions_taken: Check POLISY is cancelled. If it is cancelled no action item

INVALID_BIND_STATE.action: Check POLISY if renewed. If renewed, no action
INVALID_BIND_STATE.notes: Bind state mismatch - Ready vs Bound expected
example_actions_taken: Please check POLISY renewed or not. If renewed no action item

DATABASE_ERROR.action: Retry - raise to I&O if persistent
